missing_or_uncertain_context: exact Lean name of the definition of inverse from def.commring.inverse (part (a))

needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: associativity and identity properties used in uniqueness proof

planned_declarations.target_statement_sketch: For any commutative ring L and element a in L, there exists at most one element b such that a*b = 1 and b*a = 1.

units.source_focus_summary: Uniqueness of inverses in a commutative ring
